display.purpose: Page titles only. Full-page view headings, never in sidebars or cards.

body.purpose: All prose, list text, table cells. Max 65-75ch line length.

label.purpose: Form labels, badge text, sidebar section titles. Uppercase, ≤4 words.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Input and button keyboard focus. Consistent across all interactive elements.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Clickable card hover state. Signals interactivity.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Floating overlays only. Heaviest shadow; reserved for modal/dialog.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions.

motion.name: fast
motion.purpose: Button states, hover transitions, badge changes.

motion.name: normal
motion.purpose: Card hover, panel transitions, modal entry.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call to action. Conductor Gold with dark text. Used for primary actions on any screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1F212C; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFCA00, #E0B200); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(255,202,0,0.25); transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(255,202,0,0.25), 0 0 20px rgba(255,202,0,0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,202,0,0.25); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-primary { transition: none; } }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting action. Elevated surface with border. Sits beside primary buttons.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #F5F5F5; background: #32343F; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #3A3D48; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.14); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,202,0,0.25); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Lowest-emphasis action. Transparent at rest. Used for tertiary actions or icon-only controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #B5B5BA; background: transparent; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #3A3D48; color: #F5F5F5; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,202,0,0.25); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary container. Used for grouped content sections on all pages.
components.html:
Active Sites

Card body content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #2A2C38; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; transition: border-color 250ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.14); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #F5F5F5; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. Used across all data entry forms.
components.css: .ds-form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-form-label { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #B5B5BA; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-form-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #F5F5F5; background: #32343F; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 8px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-form-input::placeholder { color: #768492; } .ds-form-input:focus { border-color: #FFCA00; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,202,0,0.25); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Role-coded status indicator. Used on sites, tasks, timesheets, contracts.
components.html: ActivePendingOverdueDraft
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 3px 10px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 9999px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-primary { background: rgba(255,202,0,0.08); color: #FFD740; border: 1px solid rgba(255,202,0,0.15); } .ds-badge-success { background: rgba(34,197,94,0.10); color: #4ADE80; border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.15); } .ds-badge-warning { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.10); color: #F59E0B; border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.15); } .ds-badge-danger { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.10); color: #F87171; border: 1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.15); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link
components.description: Primary navigation item in the 260px sidebar. Icon + label. Active state uses Conductor Gold.
components.html: 🏗️ Sites📋 Tasks⏱️ Timesheets
components.css: .ds-sidebar-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 8px; } .ds-sidebar-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #B5B5BA; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-sidebar-link:hover { background: #3A3D48; color: #F5F5F5; } .ds-sidebar-link--active { background: rgba(255,202,0,0.08); color: #FFCA00; font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview:
ElectricVision Track is a dense, purposeful tool — every element routed to its function, nothing decorative. The Switchboard metaphor governs decisions at every scale: a switchboard handles complexity by organizing it, not hiding it. Information is present and legible; hierarchy communicates urgency, not visual style. The gold signal (Conductor Gold) moves through a deep industrial dark in the same way live current moves through a panel: intentional, directed, unmistakable.

The palette is structured, not expressive. Five tonal dark surface levels build depth without shadows at rest. Conductor Gold appears only where it earns its place: primary actions, active states, key indicators. The Electric Blue accent handles information-state color without competing. Everything else is neutral.

This system rejects the enterprise ERP aesthetic and the consumer dark-mode aesthetic. No glassmorphism by default, no gradient text, no hero-metric templates. The interface should feel like a well-made tool a field electrician and an operations manager would both trust on day one.
keyCharacteristics: Five-layer dark surface stack for depth without shadows at rest
Conductor Gold reserved for primary actions and active states only
Inter for all body/label copy; Poppins for all headings
Tonal elevation: every surface step is a distinct dark layer, not a shadow
Compact, dense information hierarchy — built for operators, not tourists

rules.name: The Conductor Rule
rules.body: Conductor Gold appears on primary actions and active states only. On any given screen, gold covers ≤10% of the surface area. Its scarcity is the signal.

rules.name: The Surface Stack Rule
rules.body: Depth is expressed through the five panel layers (Deep → Base → Surface → Elevated → Hover), not shadows. Shadows appear only as state feedback.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: All surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow on a static container is wrong. If you want something to feel more important, increase its surface layer instead.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: Inter carries the entire UI vocabulary outside of headings. Don't introduce a third family. Mono is the only permitted third family.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: No fluid clamp sizing in product UI. Fixed rem at each hierarchy level.

dos: Do use Conductor Gold on primary action buttons, active nav states, and focus rings only.
Do use the five surface layers to express depth before adding a shadow.
Do keep all heading copy in Poppins and all UI copy in Inter.
Do use full-pill badges for status labels. Keep badge copy uppercase and ≤3 words.
Do make touch targets 44px minimum. Field workers use this on phones.
Do provide both Romanian and English strings for every user-facing label.
Do use the semantic shadow vocabulary exactly: Focus Ring on inputs, Button Hover Glow on primary buttons, Modal Shadow on overlays.
donts: Don't use background-clip: text gradient text.
Don't use glassmorphism as a default card style. Reserve for login and overlays only.
Don't add border-left > 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't use display fonts (Poppins) in buttons, form labels, table cells, or badges.
Don't put shadows on static containers at rest.
Don't use gold as a decorative background fill, text gradient, or section accent.
Don't introduce a fourth font family.
Don't use Conductor Gold to color inactive states.
Don't use modals as the first solution for confirmations or secondary actions.
